message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic in participation weighting, revocation formatting, and add .rchignore

atc_participation_weighting.rs:
- Replaces bare addition of contributions_accepted + contributions_
  rejected with saturating_add() to prevent potential integer overflow
  when computing the interaction_ratio in participation weight
  calculation. On architectures where u64 overflow wraps, the previous
  code could produce a zero denominator from two large non-zero inputs,
  yielding a division-by-zero panic or a silently wrong 0.0 ratio.

revocation_integration.rs:
- Reformats a long assert! macro call in the safety-tier ordering test
  to break the message string across multiple lines, improving
  readability without changing test semantics.

.rchignore:
- Adds rch (remote compilation helper) ignore configuration to exclude
  target_crimson/ and its contents from remote build synchronization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
